name: Shinobu Maehara
description: __Height:__ 152 cm (5'0") Shinobu Maehara is an extremely shy young girl, though she does develop more confidence as the story progresses. She is aged 12 at the start of the story, and has short black hair, with one strand of hair subtly sticking out. In the Anime she first appears in episode 1. She is later introduced in episode 2 where we learn that her parents are divorcing and she is expected to leave town with one of them, but she prefers to become a resident at the Hinata apartments. name: Sophia Clodel
nativeName: ソフィア・クローデル
description: A new magician in the major clan "Night Sky Silver Rabbits," and [Selma's](https://anilist.co/character/356659/Selma-Clodel) younger sister. She was attacked by a magical beast while secretly infiltrating a labyrinth without the clan's knowledge, but was saved by [Orhun](https://anilist.co/character/356657/Orhun-Dura). She has a gentle personality, but her abilities are genuine, and she is a member of the promising new party "Squad 10." She serves as a rearguard attacker.

description: __Height__: 155 cm A young shy girl who enjoys drawing and cats. Kajiwara Sora lives and draws completely from the heart. She takes her sketchbook everywhere with her in her ongoing attempts to capture the transitory in her art. Sora's heightened awareness of mono-no-aware also causes her to notice very small details of the world around her and makes her a "my-pace" kind of person. name: Souichi Tatsumi
description: __Height:__ 178 cm __Occupation:__ Student __Hometown:__ Nagoya Souichi Tatsumi is a second-year graduate student in agriculture and the friend and senpai of Tetsushiro Morinaga, who has a crush on him. He is an aggressive and outspoken homophobe who would like to see all gays wiped off the map - all the more so because his precious younger brother has run off with a male lover.

name: Souren Araya
description: __Height:__ 190 cm Though he may be considered an average Magus at face value, he is highly skilled in the creation of Bounded Fields. He carries a special Bounded Field that is divided into three layers, and absolutely anything that steps within range of the outer field is automatically frozen in place. name: Tsugumi Harudori
description: A 14-year-old Weapon from Japan, who still has to learn how to transform properly. She can transform into a halberd. She went to DWMA (Death Weapon Meister Academy) to become a hero.

name: Ushio Tsukinoki
description: Sakuma's childhood friend. Now one of the most popular kids in class.

name: Venalita
description: Venalita is a mascot who recruits magical girls for Enormeeta. He is shrewd and pragmatic, using whatever means necessary to recruit members into Enormeeta. He is also quick of mind, as he was able to successfully get Utena to forgive him for tricking her by making up a story about how his people are being killed by magical girls, and that he doesn't mind being labelled as evil as long as he can save them.

name: Wrath
description: Wrath is the second youngest homunculi next to Sloth. He, like Pride, can age like a human. His ouroboros tattoo is located on the bottom of his left foot. Wrath is a special case among the homunculi in that he can perform alchemy, but does not have an "Ultimate" trait like the other homunculi, although some consider his alchemy to be "the Ultimate Alchemy". name: Yuuko Nishi
description: Year 2 high schooler. Yuuko has long black hair which reaches to her waist. She speaks in a Kansai dialect. She is poor with scary things, and would sometimes scream and claim that there is a ghost behind her. As she has a generally shy disposition, she is often the subject of teasing by Tooru and Nagi.

name: Yuzuki Hanyuu
description: Yuzuki Hanyu is the busty former homeroom teacher of Shota Doi of Keimon West Private High School and the former advisor of the school's concert band.

name: Akane Akaza
description: Akari's big sister. Akane has a huge obsession with her little sister, but Akari herself knows nothing about that. She collects anything related to Akari, in a result leaving Kyouko extremely shocked when she stumbled across Akane's room.
